chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 334 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 28.01.2026 Mr. Seengar Ali Shar, Advocate along with Petitioner Syed Shamshad Ali Shah, Advocate along with Respondent No.6 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant PG for the State SIP Gulzar Abro on behalf of SSP, Khairpur Mirs, SIP Iqbal Noon, SHO P.S B-Section, Khairpur Mirs and SIP Jamaluddin of PS Mirwah >>>>>..<<<<< Statements have been filed by Respondents 2, 3, 4 and 5, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Upon being confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner states that he will be satisfied, if instant Petition is disposed of giving him liberty to file an application under Section 22-A and 22-B, Cr.PC before the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace in pursuance of the directions given in the case of Abdul Hameed and another vs. Province of Sindh and others (PLD 2019 Sindh 168). Order accordingly. Petition disposed of. Judge ARBROHI
